# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: orders-api
  namespace: orders
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-api
  namespace: payments
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: users-api
  namespace: users
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: users
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-api
  namespace: inventory
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-api
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-from-frontend
  namespace: orders
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - frontend.frontend.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-from-payments
  namespace: orders
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - payments.payments.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-from-orders
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - orders.orders.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: users-from-frontend
  namespace: users
spec:
  server:
    name: users-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - frontend.frontend.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-from-orders
  namespace: inventory
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - orders.orders.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-from-frontend
  namespace: inventory
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - frontend.frontend.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-from-all-mesh
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - orders.orders.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
        - payments.payments.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
        - users.users.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
        - inventory.inventory.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
